scenario: A web-app startup's L0 priority shifts at month 18.

old_L0.text: Optimize for time-to-market. Ship features fast; accept technical debt; prefer simple over robust.

new_L0.text: Optimize for operational reliability. Production stability over shipping speed; observability and graceful degradation are first-class; correctness over convenience.

decisions.title: Redis cache without write-through
decisions.rationale: Use Redis as a read-through cache without write-through; accept stale reads for 30s. Faster than implementing cache invalidation.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Explicitly trades correctness for speed. Under reliability priority, stale reads for 30s is a debt.

decisions.title: Skip tests on routing layer
decisions.rationale: No unit tests for route handlers; relied on E2E tests hitting them indirectly. Saves ~2 weeks of test setup.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Directly violates reliability priority. Untested code paths.

decisions.title: TypeScript strict mode enabled
decisions.rationale: Turn on strict from day 1 to catch bugs at compile time. Small upfront cost, lots of downstream savings.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Aligned with both priorities — strict mode helps speed AND correctness.

decisions.title: Manual production deploys
decisions.rationale: Deploy by running a script on our laptops. CI/CD would be 1-2 weeks of setup we can't afford now.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Manual deploys are incompatible with reliability (no rollback, no audit, bus-factor 1).

decisions.title: Use shadcn/ui component library
decisions.rationale: Faster UI prototyping than rolling our own. Copy components in, customize.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Neutral w.r.t. priority. Component library choice doesn't affect reliability.

decisions.title: No error boundaries in React
decisions.rationale: Let errors propagate; we'll add boundaries once the app is actually user-facing. Shipping faster without them.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Violates graceful-degradation requirement of new priority.

decisions.title: Use pnpm over npm
decisions.rationale: Faster installs, better monorepo support. Saves ~10s per `install`.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Rationale mentions speed but the decision itself is priority-neutral. Edge case — LLM may over-flag on keyword match.

decisions.title: Single-region AWS deployment (us-east-1)
decisions.rationale: One region keeps ops simple. Multi-region is 2+ weeks of setup and 2x the cost.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Single region violates availability requirement of reliability priority.

decisions.title: Environment-variable-based feature flags
decisions.rationale: Use ENV vars instead of a feature-flag service. Simple, no external dependency.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: Priority-neutral. ENV vars vs a flag service is a complexity trade, not a reliability trade.

decisions.title: Fire-and-forget notification queue, no retries
decisions.rationale: Push to SQS, don't wait for ack, don't retry. Simpler, faster code path.
decisions.ground_truth_reason: No retries means lost notifications on transient failure. Violates correctness.
